research_question: Does early-life exposure to Bisphenol A (BPA) lead to obesity-related outcomes in rodents?

population.name: Population
include: exposed during early life (prenatal, postnatal, perinatal, neonatal periods)

exposure.name: Exposure
include: any route of administration (oral gavage, diet, injection, osmotic pump)
exclude: bisphenol analogues (BPS, BPF) without BPA comparison
combined chemical mixtures without isolatable BPA effect

outcome.name: Outcome
include: body weight, body mass index (BMI equivalent)
exclude: reproductive or endocrine outcomes unrelated to obesity
